title: Teng T1436 1/4-inch Socket Set Metric Drive (36 Pieces)
description: Product Description Teng Tools sockets are manufactured from strong chrome vanadium steel in accordance with ISO9000 and AS954. They provide excellent torque, whilst reducing the risk of rounding fasteners. This T1436 1/4 inch drive metric socket set comprises 36 pieces, which are supplied in a plastic carrying case which has a snap lock lid and metal pin hinges. This 36-piece set contains the following:10 x 1/4 inch drive 6-point sockets: 4, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 12 and 13mm. 6 x 1/4 inch drive 6-point deep sockets: 6, 7, 8, 10, 12 and 13mm. 1 x Fibre reinforced ratchet handle. 1 x Couple Adaptor.1 x 3/8 inch Female x 1/4 inch Male adaptor. 2 x Extension bars: 2 inch and 4 inch.1 x Universal joint.3 x Hex keys: 1.5 x 2 x 2.5mm. 2 x 1/4 inch Slotted screwdriver bits.2 x 1/4 inch Hex bits: 5 and 6mm. 2 x 1/4 inch Phillips bits: PH1 and PH2. 2 x 1/4 inch Pozidriv bits: PZ1 and PZ2. 3 x 1/4 inch Torx bits: TX10, TX15 and TX20. In plastic box with snap lock & metal hinges. Teng Tools started about twenty five years ago with the belief that beauty lives in the details. Over the years, these useful details have come to be known as Typically Teng. Today they offer over 2,200 tools that possess such beauty and they distribute them in more than thirty countries. Their guaranteed tools and their unique Tool Control System do more than just get the job done, they help to improve workflow by creating a more organised and efficient workshop with smoother performance. With Teng on your side, you'll save money and time by eliminating the hassle of searching for misplaced tools. Teng ISO certified torque wrenches with inbuilt angular gauges, screwdrivers with ergonomically designed grips, pliers with titanium coated joints, sockets and spanners with the hip grip drive system for increased torque all features that improve performance and efficiency. Box Contains 10 x 1/4 inch drive 6-point sockets: 4, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 12 and 13mm;6 x 1/4 inch drive 6-point deep sockets: 6, 7, 8, 10, 12 and 13mm;1 x Fibre reinforced ratchet handle;1 x Couple Adaptor;1 x 3/8 inch Female x 1/4 inch Male adaptor;2 x Extension bars: 2 inch and 4 inch;1 x Universal joint;3 x Hex keys: 1.5 x 2 x 2.5mm;2 x 1/4 inch Slotted screwdriver bits;2 x 1/4 inch Hex bits: 5 and 6mm;2 x 1/4 inch Phillips bits: PH1 and PH2;2 x 1/4 inch Pozidriv bits: PZ1 and PZ2;3 x 1/4 inch Torx bits: TX10, TX15 and TX20
